cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Encounter with the Star Man
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny transitions from unaware proximity to direct confrontation with the Star Man, moving from routine activity to physical violation, resistance, and emotional collapse as he gains control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: unaware of being observed during household tasks
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: disarmed and emotionally shattered after failed resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Star Man's intentions and continued pursuit

cross_scene_arcs.title: Transformation of Relationship from Adversary to Friend
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny and the Star Man evolve from hostile encounter to mutual friendship, marked by rescue, care, symbolic exchange, and emotional closure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: adversarial relationship established through physical violation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: mutual friendship affirmed and memorialized through the green ring and message for her child
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to explain the Star Man's role in her child's life

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival, Healing, and Reentry into Society
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After being critically injured and rescued, Jenny is healed by the Star Man, awakens to his departure, and takes active steps to reintegrate safely by contacting authorities.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: critically wounded and carried to safety
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: physically healed and self-reporting to authorities as a survivor
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: fear of being intercepted or harmed during return

cross_scene_arcs.title: Legacy and Maternal Continuity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny preserves the emotional bond with the Star Man by keeping the green ring and requesting his song for her unborn child, culminating in the birth of her son after the spacecraft departs.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: seeking ways to preserve Star Man's presence for her baby
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: now a mother; connection to Star Man becomes memory

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Skeptic to Believer in the Extraterrestrial Threat
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin transitions from initial doubt about the extraterrestrial threat to full acknowledgment of its reality after witnessing alien communication, then receives direct orders to locate and contain the surviving entity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: doubtful about the existence of an extraterrestrial threat due to lack of visual evidence
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: accepts the alien is alive and shifts to active pursuit under official orders
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about the nature and intent of the surviving alien

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Institutional Trust and Operational Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin moves from being a field investigator to mission lead, but faces diminishing support, unclear directives, and growing isolation as institutional backing erodes and the mission becomes politically marginalized.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: authorized and supported mission lead with clear objectives
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: operating with limited resources and political cover, aware of team's expendability
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether the mission can succeed without institutional support or defined protocols

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Conflict Over the Use of Lethal Force
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin increasingly resists command's push toward lethal action, culminating in his refusal to engage the Star Man and eventual abandonment of the mission on moral grounds.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: ordered to participate in a lethal operation against the shapeshifting target
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: rejects command, refuses to fire, and self-terminates his role in the mission
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: consequences of defying orders and the ethical cost of using force against a non-hostile being

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deepening Personal and Professional Introspection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin confronts personal failures and professional doubts, which intensify as the mission progresses, ultimately shaping his decision to retire rather than carry out lethal orders.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: expresses personal insecurity and failed marriage, contrasting professional competence with private shortcomings
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: integrates personal values into professional action by choosing moral integrity over duty
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: tension between personal worth and professional identity remains unresolved

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation and De-escalation in Field Command
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin assumes increasing tactical authority in the field, shifting from responder to commander, but his influence wanes as command disputes his judgment and ultimately removes him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: takes tactical command at the pasture, coordinating evidence and negotiation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: challenged by command, removed from operational role, and isolated for dissent
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: lack of clear chain of command and recognition of field-based threat assessment

cross_scene_arcs.title: Physiological Adaptation and Survival
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The Star Man transitions from near-fatal respiratory distress due to Earth's atmosphere to full physiological adaptation, regaining consciousness and mobility despite suit damage.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: adapted to Earth's air, mobile, self-reliant
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: damaged suit remains a vulnerability in long-term survival

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emergence of Communication and Language Learning
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The Star Man progresses from failed attempts to contact his ally to imitating human speech and learning symbolic systems like money and emotional expression.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: unable to establish communication with home or allies
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: demonstrates understanding of human language, symbols, and social cues
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: initial difficulty distinguishing identity documents from currency

cross_scene_arcs.title: Development of Relationship with Jenny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The relationship evolves from coercive interaction to mutual trust, emotional bonding, shared parenthood, and final farewell as the Star Man departs Earth.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: mutual affection, confirmed friendship, shared child, emotional farewell
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: future of their child and possibility of reunion remain uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shift from Survival to Purposeful Action
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The Star Man moves from basic survival and reconnaissance to constructing tools, pursuing a mission, and ultimately fulfilling a personal and possibly reproductive objective before departure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: mission-completed, departs with human knowledge and emotional closure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: true purpose of the modified drill and long-term impact of his actions on Earth

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral and Emotional Transformation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The Star Man shifts from using violence to protect himself to demonstrating care, healing, and emotional vulnerability, culminating in acts of protection, healing, and offering parenthood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: uses firearm to assert control, acts out of self-preservation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: protects, heals, and forms deep emotional bonds, embracing caregiving and fatherhood
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: tension between his alien nature and adopted human emotional values
